name: TF Dungeon
description:
This is my own version of Comedybomb's own Ero-TF dungeon. it is built on their text but has some notable modifications. Please enjoy!

You are a treasure hunter searching this dungeon for loot! Try to make it through each floor without transforming into a thematically-appropriate object / archetype. Any advice on improving the bot is appreciated!
creator: Pinball for the NES
